name: Resource Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in Louisiana offering personal and business banking, loans, and cash management services across eight branch locations.
description_long:
Resource Bank is a traditional community bank operating in Louisiana with eight branch locations spanning Baton Rouge, Bogalusa, Covington, Franklinton, Mandeville, Metairie, New Orleans, and Slidell. The bank positions itself under the tagline "Local Banking. Better Banking," emphasizing personalized service and regional focus.

Resource Bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and commercial banking products. On the personal side, they provide checking and savings accounts, personal loans, and MasterCard credit cards, with the ability to open accounts entirely online. For business clients, they offer cash management solutions, remote deposit capture (RPM), lockbox services, wire transfer services, business credit cards, merchant services through Clover payment processing, positive pay fraud prevention, commercial currency services, and payroll/HR solutions through Netchex. They also provide Health Savings Account (HSA) employee benefits for companies offering high-deductible health plans.

Resource Bank distinguishes itself through integrated business solutions and a focus on personalized lending. Their "Customized Loan Options" for both personal and commercial purposes suggest individualized underwriting rather than algorithmic decisions. The bank emphasizes fee-free ATM access through thousands of nationwide locations and offers all-in-one closings for transactions. They are FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing standard federal deposit protection.

As a regional community bank, Resource Bank operates within a limited geographic footprint and may not be suitable for customers seeking national branch convenience. The website provides limited information about specific interest rates, fee schedules, or loan terms. Online account opening availability is mentioned but appears to be selective (separate links for new vs. existing clients). For businesses requiring sophisticated treasury management or those outside Louisiana, larger regional or national banks may offer more extensive resources.
services: Personal checking accounts with online opening
Personal savings accounts with online opening
Business cash management platform for cash flow control
Remote deposit capture (RPM) for check scanning
Merchant services through Clover payment processing partnership
Commercial currency drop-off with armored car processing
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full federal backing up to standard limits
Online account opening for both personal checking and savings accounts
Comprehensive business solutions including cash management, lockbox, and wire transfers in a single relationship
Remote deposit capture (RPM) service for check scanning from desktop, reducing deposit time
Thousands of fee-free ATM locations nationwide despite being a regional bank
Integrated merchant services through Clover partnership with POS technology
Health Savings Account (HSA) employee benefit offerings for business clients
Dual authentication security for business banking access
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only 8 branches in Louisiana, restricting physical access for non-regional customers
Website lacks transparency on specific APRs, interest rates, and fee schedules for products
No mention of minimum balance requirements, monthly fees, or overdraft fee policies on publicly visible pages
Limited information about loan terms, approval rates, or specific loan amount ranges beyond "customized" descriptions
No clear indication of whether online banking and account services are available to all customers or restricted by location
best_for: Louisiana-based small to medium businesses seeking personalized cash management and merchant services
Individual customers within Resource Bank's service areas wanting online account opening with local branch support
Businesses with high-deductible health plans looking to offer HSA employee benefits
Commercial clients needing integrated payment processing, deposit capture, and fraud prevention tools
diagnosis: Resource Bank is best for small-to-medium businesses and individuals in Louisiana seeking personalized community banking with integrated business solutions. Primary caveat: geographic limitation to eight Louisiana locations may restrict access for non-regional customers, and website lacks transparent pricing and term information needed for rate/fee comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
